title: Walking the Dog
content: Every evening, Ben walks his dog around the neighborhood. His dog, Charlie, becomes excited as soon as Ben picks up the leash. They usually walk through a small park with tall trees and quiet streets. Charlie likes to stop and smell everything along the way. Sometimes children ask if they can pet him because he is very friendly. Ben enjoys these walks because they help him relax after work. Tonight, the sky was pink and orange as the sun disappeared. It felt like a perfect evening outside.
